title: Tools That Benefit from Post-Install Hooks
description: Catalog of tools that commonly require post-install configuration and suggested hook scripts for jarvy.toml templates
purpose: Provide ready-to-use hook examples for common tools to help users get started with hooks

tools.name: node
tools.description: Install global npm packages after Node.js installation

tools.name: rust
tools.description: Add Rust components and install common cargo tools

tools.name: python3
tools.description: Upgrade pip and install common Python tools
suggested_hooks: pip3 install pipenv virtualenv black ruff

tools.name: docker
tools.description: Configure Docker daemon and install plugins
tools.platform_notes: May require elevated privileges or Docker Desktop running

tools.name: go
tools.platform_notes: Requires GOPATH to be set correctly

tools.name: kubectl
tools.platform_notes: Requires cluster access to be configured

tools.name: zsh
tools.description: Install Oh My Zsh or configure shell
suggested_hooks: echo 'Zsh installed. Run: sh -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.github.com/ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh/master/tools/install.sh)" to install Oh My Zsh'

tools.name: nvim
tools.description: Install plugin managers and sync plugins
tools.platform_notes: Plugin installation may require additional setup

tools.name: awscli
suggested_hooks: aws configure set region us-east-1 --profile default
tools.platform_notes: Requires AWS credentials to be configured

tools.name: terraform
tools.description: Install Terraform providers and configure cache

tools.name: gh
suggested_hooks: echo 'GitHub CLI installed. Run: gh auth login to authenticate'

tools.name: starship
tools.description: Add starship init to shell config

example_config.content:
[provisioner]
git = "latest"
node = "20"
rust = "stable"
python3 = "3.12"

[hooks]
pre_setup = "echo 'Setting up development environment...'"
post_setup = "echo 'Development environment ready!'"

[hooks.config]
timeout = 600
continue_on_error = false

[hooks.git]
post_install = "git config --global init.defaultBranch main"

[hooks.node]
post_install = "npm install -g pnpm typescript"

[hooks.rust]
post_install = "rustup component add clippy rustfmt"

[hooks.python3]
post_install = "pip3 install --upgrade pip && pip3 install pipenv"

future_enhancements: Add pre_install hooks for prerequisite checks
Add hook templates library in Jarvy
Support downloading hook scripts from URLs
